hero.title: Your liquid savings, working every single day.
hero.subtitle: Access institutional money-market funds, hand-picked and monitored by your <1>wealth advisor</1>. Daily liquidity, yields net of fees.

yieldCard.footer: Refreshed every business day · Net of management fees

howItWorks.title: How it works, concretely
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps, with a dedicated advisor as soon as your amounts justify it.

steps.s1Desc: Create your client area online in under 5 minutes. Identity verification compliant with KYC requirements.
steps.s2Desc: Transfer from your bank account to the fund of your choice. No imposed minimum — adapted to your savings capacity.
steps.s3Desc: Above a certain balance, a dedicated Wealth Management Advisor reviews your situation, your goals and your tax profile to optimise your allocation.
steps.s4Desc: Interest credited every business day. Withdrawals available at any time, without penalty or notice. Real-time tracking in your client area.

trustChain.title: Your savings, protected at every step
trustChain.subtitle: A chain of trust between regulation, segregation and transparency.
trustChain.block1Body: Quercus Capital is registered as a CIF & COA with ORIAS (no. 24004789) and operates as a Wealth Management Advisor under AMF supervision. Your investment is governed by French regulation.
trustChain.block2Body: Your money is never held by Quercus Capital. It is custodied by a top-tier depositary bank (BNP Paribas / CACEIS), part of a major European banking group. Quercus Capital's failure would have no impact on your assets.
trustChain.block3Body: Every fund is approved by the AMF, audited by an independent auditor (PwC), and its prospectus is publicly available. You know exactly what your money is invested in.

testimonials.title: What our clients say about their experience

sophie.name: Sophie M.
sophie.quote: My advisor at Quercus showed me how my savings were sitting on a 3% account, while they could be working in a money-market fund with the same yield but full liquidity. I should have done it much sooner.

laurent.name: Laurent B.
laurent.quote: I was looking for a way to place my company's cash without locking it up. Daily availability and the support of my wealth advisor changed everything for me.

couple.name: Marie & Thomas D.
couple.quote: We wanted to secure part of our savings while still earning interest. The human support from Quercus Capital reassured us at every step.

advisorThreshold.title: A dedicated advisor to support you.
advisorThreshold.body: Above a certain level of assets on the platform, a Wealth Management Advisor is assigned to you. They build with you a tailor-made Advised Portfolio: an asset allocation combining Smart Cash, Cash & Carry, bonds, equities and alternative solutions, calibrated to your goals and your horizon.

roadmap.title: Get started with Quercus in minutes

steps.s1Title: Become a Quercus member in a few clicks.
steps.s1Text: Provide your details, secure your access via two-factor authentication (2FA) and verify your identity. A smooth, digital process compliant with the highest security standards.
steps.s2Title: Deposit your funds with peace of mind.
steps.s2Text: Make a transfer to your Quercus account. Your funds are deposited with our depositary bank (CACEIS / Crédit Agricole), guaranteeing full segregation and maximum protection of your capital.
steps.s3Title: Watch your interest grow every day.
steps.s3Text: From day one, your capital generates interest. Gains are automatically capitalised and reinvested daily, maximising the effect of compound interest with no action on your part.
steps.s4Text: Withdraw all or part of your funds at any time, with no exit fees. For any request submitted before 12:25, your funds are available the same day (T+0). Excellence is also freedom.

securityBlock.title: Your security is our absolute priority.
securityBlock.bodyPrefix: Quercus never holds your funds. They are kept by
securityBlock.bodySuffix: group, Europe's leading depositary. This full segregation guarantees that your capital remains protected, no matter what happens.

items.a1: Quercus charges a 0.25% management fee per year, already deducted from the net yield shown. There are no entry, exit, account-keeping or withdrawal fees. The yield you see is the yield you receive.
items.a2: Your funds are never held by Quercus. They are kept by CACEIS, a subsidiary of the Crédit Agricole group and Europe's leading depositary. This full segregation means your capital remains protected even if Quercus were to fail.
items.q3: Can I withdraw my money on a Sunday?
items.a3: You can submit a withdrawal request at any time, including weekends. Requests are processed on business days. For any request submitted before 12:25 on a business day, your funds are available the same day (T+0 liquidity).
items.a4: Yes. Quercus is registered as a Financial Investment Advisor (CIF) and Insurance Broker (COA) with ORIAS (no. 24004789). We are supervised by the AMF and comply with anti-money-laundering (AML/CFT) regulatory obligations.
